findings.message: Breaking schema change: `create_item` adds a required non-null argument `description: str`. Existing clients that call the mutation with only `name` will now fail GraphQL validation, since `description` has no default and is non-nullable. This is a backwards-incompatible change with no compatible path.
findings.suggestion: Make the new argument optional/nullable with a default, e.g. `description: str | None = None` (or `Optional[str] = strawberry.UNSET`), so existing clients that omit it continue to work.
